title: [InstCombine] Optimistically allow multiple shufflevector uses in foldOpPhi

tests.source_program:
define <16 x i32> @test_wide_vector_16xi32(i1 %c, ptr %p0, ptr %p1) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %then, label %merge

then:
  %load0 = load <16 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 64
  %load1 = load <16 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 64
  %shuf_in = shufflevector <16 x i32> %load0, <16 x i32> %load1, <32 x i32> <i32 0, i32 16, i32 1, i32 17, i32 2, i32 18, i32 3, i32 19, i32 4, i32 20, i32 5, i32 21, i32 6, i32 22, i32 7, i32 23, i32 8, i32 24, i32 9, i32 25, i32 10, i32 26, i32 11, i32 27, i32 12, i32 28, i32 13, i32 29, i32 14, i32 30, i32 15, i32 31>
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <32 x i32> [ zeroinitializer, %entry ], [ %shuf_in, %then ]
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <32 x i32> %phi, <32 x i32> poison, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14, i32 16, i32 18, i32 20, i32 22, i32 24, i32 26, i32 28, i32 30>
  %shuf2 = shufflevector <32 x i32> %phi, <32 x i32> poison, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14, i32 16, i32 18, i32 20, i32 22, i32 24, i32 26, i32 28, i32 30>
  %add = add <16 x i32> %shuf1, %shuf2
  ret <16 x i32> %add
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:

then:

  %shuf_in = shufflevector <16 x i32> %load0, <16 x i32> %load1, <32 x i32> <i32 0, i32 16, i32 1, i32 17, i32 2, i32 18, i32 3, i32 19, i32 4, i32 20, i32 5, i32 21, i32 6, i32 22, i32 7, i32 23, i32 8, i32 24, i32 9, i32 25, i32 10, i32 26, i32 11, i32 27, i32 12, i32 28, i32 13, i32 29, i32 14, i32 30, i32 15, i32 31>
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <16 x i32> [ zeroinitializer, %entry ], [ shufflevector <16 x i32> %shuf_in, <16 x i32> poison, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 1, i32 2, i32 3, i32 4, i32 5, i32 6, i32 7, i32 8, i32 9, i32 10, i32 11, i32 12, i32 13, i32 14, i32 15> ]
  %add = add <16 x i32> %phi, %phi
  ret <16 x i32> %add
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses <32 x i32> and <16 x i32> vector types which are wider than any in the existing tests (<8 x float>, <4 x i16>, <8 x i16>). Tests the optimization with larger vector widths.

alive2.src:
define <16 x i32> @test_wide_vector_16xi32(i1 %c, ptr %p0, ptr %p1) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %then, label %merge

then:
  %load0 = load <16 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 64
  %load1 = load <16 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 64
  %shuf_in = shufflevector <16 x i32> %load0, <16 x i32> %load1, <32 x i32> <i32 0, i32 16, i32 1, i32 17, i32 2, i32 18, i32 3, i32 19, i32 4, i32 20, i32 5, i32 21, i32 6, i32 22, i32 7, i32 23, i32 8, i32 24, i32 9, i32 25, i32 10, i32 26, i32 11, i32 27, i32 12, i32 28, i32 13, i32 29, i32 14, i32 30, i32 15, i32 31>
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <32 x i32> [ zeroinitializer, %entry ], [ %shuf_in, %then ]
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <32 x i32> %phi, <32 x i32> poison, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14, i32 16, i32 18, i32 20, i32 22, i32 24, i32 26, i32 28, i32 30>
  %shuf2 = shufflevector <32 x i32> %phi, <32 x i32> poison, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14, i32 16, i32 18, i32 20, i32 22, i32 24, i32 26, i32 28, i32 30>
  %add = add <16 x i32> %shuf1, %shuf2
  ret <16 x i32> %add
}

; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define <16 x i32> @test_wide_vector_16xi32(i1 %c, ptr %p0, ptr %p1) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %then, label %merge

then:                                             ; preds = %entry
  %load0 = load <16 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 64
  %0 = shl <16 x i32> %load0, splat (i32 1)
  br label %merge

merge:                                            ; preds = %then, %entry
  %phi = phi <16 x i32> [ zeroinitializer, %entry ], [ %0, %then ]
  ret <16 x i32> %phi
}

tests.source_program:
define <8 x i1> @test_i1_vector_elements(i1 %c, ptr %p0, ptr %p1) {
entry:
  br i1 %c, label %then, label %merge

then:
  %load0 = load <8 x i1>, ptr %p0, align 1
  %load1 = load <8 x i1>, ptr %p1, align 1
  %shuf_in = shufflevector <8 x i1> %load0, <8 x i1> %load1, <16 x i32> <i32 0, i32 8, i32 1, i32 9, i32 2, i32 10, i32 3, i32 11, i32 4, i32 12, i32 5, i32 13, i32 6, i32 14, i32 7, i32 15>
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <16 x i1> [ zeroinitializer, %entry ], [ %shuf_in, %then ]
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <16 x i1> %phi, <16 x i1> poison, <8 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14>
  %shuf2 = shufflevector <16 x i1> %phi, <16 x i1> poison, <8 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 4, i32 6, i32 8, i32 10, i32 12, i32 14>
  %and = and <8 x i1> %shuf1, %shuf2
  ret <8 x i1> %and
}

  br label %merge

tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses <16 x i1> and <8 x i1> vector types with boolean elements. Existing tests use float, i16, and i8 types but not i1. Tests the optimization with predicate/mask vector types.

tests.source_program:
define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  br i1 %c1, label %then1, label %then2

then1:
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

then2:
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ %load0, %then1 ], [ %load1, %then3 ], [ <i32 0, i32 0, i32 0, i32 0>, %then2 ]
  %shuf0 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 3>
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 3>
  %add = add <4 x i32> %shuf0, %shuf1
  ret <4 x i32> %add
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:

then1:
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

then2:
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ <i32 0, i32 0, i32 0, i32 0>, %then1 ], [ <i32 0, i32 0, i32 0, i32 0>, %then3 ], [ <i32 0, i32 0, i32 0, i32 0>, %then2 ]
  %add = add <4 x i32> %phi, %phi
  ret <4 x i32> %add
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only mentions PHI nodes generally but all examples show 2-way PHIs; this tests 3-way PHI with multiple incoming blocks

alive2.src:
define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  br i1 %c1, label %then1, label %then2

then1:
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

then2:
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ %load0, %then1 ], [ %load1, %then3 ], [ <i32 0, i32 0, i32 0, i32 0>, %then2 ]
  %shuf0 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 3>
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 3>
  %add = add <4 x i32> %shuf0, %shuf1
  ret <4 x i32> %add
}

; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  br i1 %c1, label %then1, label %then2

then1:                                            ; preds = %entry
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

then2:                                            ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:                                            ; preds = %then2
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:                                            ; preds = %then3, %then2, %then1
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ %load0, %then1 ], [ %load1, %then3 ], [ zeroinitializer, %then2 ]
  %0 = shl <4 x i32> %phi, splat (i32 1)
  %add = shufflevector <4 x i32> %0, <4 x i32> poison, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 3>
  ret <4 x i32> %add
}

define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  br i1 %c1, label %then1, label %then2

then2:
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

then1:
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ %load0, %then1 ], [ %load1, %then3 ], [ { 0, 0, 0, 0 }, %then2 ]
  %shuf0 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, 0, 2, 1, 3
  %shuf1 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %phi, <4 x i32> poison, 0, 2, 1, 3
  %add = add <4 x i32> %shuf0, %shuf1
  ret <4 x i32> %add

define <4 x i32> @three_way_phi_shuffle(i1 %c1, i1 %c2, ptr %p0, ptr %p1, ptr %p2) {
entry:
  br i1 %c1, label %then1, label %then2

then2:
  br i1 %c2, label %then3, label %merge

then3:
  %load1 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p1, align 16
  br label %merge

then1:
  %load0 = load <4 x i32>, ptr %p0, align 16
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi <4 x i32> [ %load0, %then1 ], [ %load1, %then3 ], [ { 0, 0, 0, 0 }, %then2 ]
  %#0 = shl <4 x i32> %phi, { 1, 1, 1, 1 }
  %add = shufflevector <4 x i32> %#0, <4 x i32> poison, 0, 2, 1, 3
  ret <4 x i32> %add
}
